---
title: "Subscribe to ITK Research"
description: "Email lists covering long-form research, daily NEM market snapshots, and a closed iOS dashboard beta."
comments: false
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

Tick any combination. One-click unsubscribe in every email.

::: {.subscribe-options}

::: {.subscribe-option}
### Weekly research articles
*1–2 per week*

Long-form NEM notes: data centres, coal closures, battery revenue, international comparisons. Same as the [Articles page](posts.html), in your inbox.
:::

::: {.subscribe-option}
### Midday NEM snapshot
*Daily, 12:00 Sydney*

- Spot VWAP vs 7-day and last-year
- Coal offline
- Wind, last 8h vs 7-day
- STTM gas prices
:::

::: {.subscribe-option}
### Evening peak report
*Daily, ~19:00 Sydney*

- Peak prices vs 7-day and last-year
- Coal offline
- Battery fleet SOC vs yesterday and a week ago
- STTM gas
- Predispatch, next 24h
:::

::: {.subscribe-option}
### Beta iOS dashboard app
*Waitlist — limited spots*

Closed iPhone beta: real-time NEM prices, generation, outages, battery SOC. Via TestFlight; we contact selected applicants. Ticking this box joins the waitlist, not the beta.
:::

:::

::: {.subscribe-form-wrapper}

```{=html}
<link href="//cdn-images.mailchimp.com/embedcode/classic-061523.css" rel="stylesheet" type="text/css">
<div id="mc_embed_signup">
    <form action="https://itkservices.us20.list-manage.com/subscribe/post?u=12833f5117af80753136459c3&amp;id=7745127a22&amp;f_id=00fc1feaf0" method="post" id="mc-embedded-subscribe-form" name="mc-embedded-subscribe-form" class="validate" target="_self" novalidate>
        <div id="mc_embed_signup_scroll">
            <div class="indicates-required"><span class="asterisk">*</span> indicates required</div>
            <div class="mc-field-group">
                <label for="mce-EMAIL">Email address <span class="asterisk">*</span></label>
                <input type="email" name="EMAIL" class="required email" id="mce-EMAIL" required value="">
            </div>
            <div class="mc-field-group">
                <label for="mce-FNAME">First name</label>
                <input type="text" name="FNAME" class="text" id="mce-FNAME" value="">
            </div>
            <div class="mc-field-group">
                <label for="mce-LNAME">Last name</label>
                <input type="text" name="LNAME" class="text" id="mce-LNAME" value="">
            </div>
            <div class="mc-field-group input-group">
                <strong>Subscriptions</strong>
                <ul>
                    <li><input type="checkbox" name="group[295258][1]" id="mce-group295258-0" value=""><label for="mce-group295258-0">Weekly research articles</label></li>
                    <li><input type="checkbox" name="group[295258][2]" id="mce-group295258-1" value=""><label for="mce-group295258-1">Midday NEM snapshot</label></li>
                    <li><input type="checkbox" name="group[295258][32]" id="mce-group295258-2" value=""><label for="mce-group295258-2">Evening peak report</label></li>
                    <li><input type="checkbox" name="group[295258][64]" id="mce-group295258-3" value=""><label for="mce-group295258-3">Beta iOS dashboard app (limited spots — we'll contact you)</label></li>
                </ul>
            </div>
            <div id="mce-responses" class="clear foot">
                <div class="response" id="mce-error-response" style="display: none;"></div>
                <div class="response" id="mce-success-response" style="display: none;"></div>
            </div>
            <div aria-hidden="true" style="position: absolute; left: -5000px;">
                <input type="text" name="b_12833f5117af80753136459c3_7745127a22" tabindex="-1" value="">
            </div>
            <div class="optionalParent">
                <div class="clear foot">
                    <input type="submit" name="subscribe" id="mc-embedded-subscribe" class="button" value="Subscribe">
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </form>
</div>
```

:::

::: {.subscribe-footer}
Already subscribed? Use **"update your preferences"** in any ITK email to add lists.

Your email stays with ITK Services. Unsubscribe one-click from any email.
:::
